hero.title: Ingufu zisukuye ejo hazaza heza
hero.subtitle: Guha imbaraga abaturage binyuze mu mishinga y'ingufu zikomoka ku zuba ihendutse kandi yizewe mu Rwanda no mu karere.

solar_panels.title: Imirasire y'izuba
solar_panels.description: Imirasire yo mu bwoko bwa monocrystalline ikozwe mu buryo bwo gukusanya ingufu nyinshi n'iyo izuba ryaba ridacyeye cyane.

power_stations.title: Imashini zitanga umuriro zigendanye
power_stations.description: Zitanga umuriro mwinshi kandi zishobora gukoreshwa hanze, mu rugo cyane cyane mu gihe umuriro wagiye.

storage_systems.title: Sisitemu zo kubika ingufu
storage_systems.description: Uburyo bwizewe bwo kubika umuriro mu rugo cyangwa mu bucuruzi bukoresha bateri zigezweho.

direct_import.title: Gutumiza mu mahanga bitarushya
direct_import.description: Uburyo bwo kugeza ibikoresho ku bakiriya mu buryo bwihuse kandi ku giciro cyiza.

quality.title: Ibikoresho byiza byizewe
quality.description: Ibikoresho byacu biba byageragejwe bihagije kugira ngo bikore igihe kirekire.

support.title: Gufashwa mu Rwanda binyuze muri Rwanda Biz Hub
support.description: Abakozi bacu bari mu Rwanda bazabafasha kuva mutumije ibikoresho kugeza bishyizwe mu rugo rwanyu.

cta_section.title: Witeguye gutangira umushinga wawe?
cta_section.subtitle: Turahari muri Kigali kugira ngo tugufashe. Saba inama uyu munsi.

header.title: Serivisi n'Ibisobonuro mu Rwanda
header.subtitle: Kuva mu ruganda kugeza hashyizwe mu rugo, Rwanda Biz Hub ifasha mu buryo bwose bwo kugeza ingufu zikomoka ku zuba mu Rwanda.

engineering.title: Gushushanya n'Ubwubatsi
engineering.description: Itsinda ryacu ry'enjeniyeri riri muri Kigali rishushanya sisitemu bijyanye n'aho uherereye hamwe n'ingufu ukeneye.

installation.title: Gushyira mu bikorwa (Installation)
installation.description: Abakozi bacu b'inzobere bashyira mu bikorwa umushinga wawe hitawe ku mutekano no gukora neza kw'ibikoresho.

support.title: Gukurikirana n'Ubufasha (Support)
support.description: Ntabwo tugarukira ku gushyira mu bikorwa gusa. Rwanda Biz Hub itanga ubufasha bwuzuye nyuma y'uko umushinga urangiye.
features: Serivisi yo gusana ibikoresho muri Kigali
Ubufasha kuri terefone mu masaha y'akazi

biz_hub.title: Ibyiza bya Rwanda Biz Hub
biz_hub.description: Turahuza ikoranabuhanga ryo mu Bushinwa n'ubumenyi bw'abakozi b'Abanyarwanda kugira ngo tuguhe serivisi nziza.

tags.direct: Kuva mu ruganda kugeza ku mukiriya

cta.title: Witeguye gutangira umushinga wawe?
cta.description: Vugana n'enjeniyeri bacu bari muri Kigali uyu munsi kugira ngo tugufashe gushushanya sisitemu yawe.

header.title: Twandikire Ruichu Solar Rwanda
header.subtitle: Ufite umushinga ushaka gutangira cyangwa ukeneye inama z'ubumenyi? Itsinda ryacu muri Kigali ryiteguye kugufasha.

hours.title: Amasaha y'akazi
hours.value: Kuwa mbere - Kuwa gatanu, 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM

experts.title: Hura n'inzobere zacu
experts.description: Twemera ubufatanye bwa hafi. Abakozi bacu muri Kigali barahari kugira ngo bagufashe muri byose bifitanye isano n'umushinga wawe.

form.title: Tyoherereze ubutumwa
form.checkbox: Saba igiciro cyangwa inama muri Kigali

map.title: Sura ibiro byacu muri Kigali
map.description: Ibiro byacu biherereye mu mujyi rwagati wa Kigali. Urashobora kudusura mu masaha y'akazi.

hero.title: Gufasha u Rwanda binyuze mu guhanga udushya
hero.subtitle: Twiyemeje kwihutisha ikoreshwa ry'ingufu zisukuye binyuze mu buryo bwizewe kandi bugezweho.

heritage.title: Umuyobozi ku rwego rw'isi mu kubika ingufu
heritage.p1: Ruichu Solar Rwanda ni umufatanyabikorwa wa Shaoxing Ruichu Technology Co., Ltd., uruganda rukora ibikoresho byo kubika ingufu ku rwego rw'isi.
heritage.p2: Twubatse uburyo bwo gukora ibikoresho bihuye n'ibyo abantu bakeneye, duhereye ku bunararibonye bwacu bwo mu Burayi, Amerika, Aziya n'Afurika.

quality.title: Guhanga udushya n'ubuziranenge buhambaye
quality.p1: Udushya ni ishingiro ry'ibikoresho byacu. Dufite itsinda ry'inzobere rihora rishaka uburyo bwo kuvugurura ikoranabuhanga.
quality.p2: Ubuziranenge ntabwo tugarukira. Dusuzuma buri kantu kose kuva ku bikoresho by'ibanze kugeza igikoresho cyuzuye.

mission.title: Kugeza ikoranabuhanga mu gihugu cy'imisozi igihumbi
mission.p1: Intego yacu mu Rwanda ntabwo ari ukugurisha ibikoresho gusa. Dutanga inama n'ibishushanyo bijyanye n'ikirere n'imikorere y'umuriro mu Rwanda.
mission.p2: Binyuze muri Rwanda Biz Hub, dutanga ubufasha bwuzuye muri Kigali kuva utangiye kugura kugeza utangiye gukoresha ibikoresho.

cta.title: Fatanya n'umuyobozi ku rwego rw'isi
cta.subtitle: Zana ikoranabuhanga rigezweho mu mushinga wawe mu Rwanda. Twubake ejo hazaza heza uyu munsi.

hero.title: Ibyiza bya Ruichu
hero.subtitle: Twubaka ejo hazaza heza duhuza ikoranabuhanga ryo ku rwego rw'isi n'ubumenyi bw'abakozi b'Abanyarwanda.

direct.title: Gutumiza mu ruganda bidaciye ku bandi
direct.description: Gukorana natwe bivuze ko ubona ibikoresho biturutse mu ruganda mu buryo bwihuse kandi budahenze.

quality.title: Ubuziranenge bwemewe ku rwego rw'isi
quality.description: Ibikoresho byacu byujuje ubuziranenge mpuzamahanga nka CE, RoHS na UN38.3.

biz_hub.title: Ubufasha bwa Rwanda Biz Hub
biz_hub.description: Dutanga inama n'ubufasha mu buryo bwuzuye muri Kigali kugira ngo umushinga wawe ugende neza.

global.title: Ubunararibonye ku rwego rw'isi
global.description: Ubunararibonye bwacu bwo mu bihugu bitandukanye butuma tuguha ibishushanyo binogeye akarere uherereyemo.

cta.title: Fatanya na Ruichu Solar Rwanda
cta.subtitle: Urashaka kongera ingufu z'umushinga wawe? Inzobere zacu ziri hano kugira ngo zigufashe.

header.title: Ibiranga ibikoresho byacu
header.subtitle: Ibikoresho by'ingufu zikomoka ku zuba byujuje ubuziranenge bigezwa mu Rwanda binyuye mu buryo bwizewe.

solar_panels.title: Imirasire y'izuba
solar_panels.subtitle: Ikoranabuhanga ryo mu Bushinwa
solar_panels.description: Imirasire yacu yatoranyijwe hitawe ku buryo izuba ryaka mu Rwanda kugira ngo itange ingufu nyinshi.

portable_power.title: Imashini zitanga umuriro (Portable Power)
portable_power.subtitle: Umuriro aho uri hose
portable_power.description: Imashini zishobora kugendana, zikoreshwa hanze cyangwa mu rugo mu gihe umuriro wagiye.

storage_systems.title: Sisitemu zo kubika ingufu
storage_systems.subtitle: Kwigira mu ngufu
storage_systems.description: Uburyo bwo kubika umuriro mu rugo cyangwa mu bucuruzi, bukoreshwa hamwe n'intsinga zigezweho.

cta.title: Witeguye gucana ejo hazaza? Tubwire.
cta.subtitle: Inama z'ubumenyi muri Kigali ziraboneka. Saba inama uyu munsi kugira ngo tugufashe.

brand.description: Kwihutisha ikoreshwa ry'ingufu zisukuye ku rwego rw'isi binyuze mu bisubizo by'ingufu z'icyatsi zizewe, zikora neza, kandi zifite ubwenge mu Gihugu cy'Imisozi Igihumbi.
